blocks.content: With telemetry flowing, you can now explore your MySQL query performance using the Queries Overview dashboard. This dashboard is your starting point for identifying slow queries, understanding execution patterns, and finding optimization opportunities.
Navigate to the Queries Overview dashboard.
Click **Queries** in the Database Observability navigation.
You've opened the Queries Overview dashboard.
Review the summary metrics at the top of the dashboard.
Review the **Duration Average** metric showing typical query execution time.
blocks.tooltip: Spikes in average duration may indicate performance regressions or resource contention.

blocks.content: Review the **Errors** metric showing total query errors and error percentage.
blocks.tooltip: High error percentages indicate queries that need investigation.

blocks.content: Review the **Rate** metric showing queries per second and total count.
blocks.tooltip: This shows your database load and helps identify peak usage periods.

blocks.content: You now understand the high-level metrics that provide an immediate overview of database activity.
Explore the query performance table to find specific queries.
Review the query performance table showing individual queries with their execution statistics.
blocks.tooltip: Each row shows a normalized SQL statement with duration, call count, errors, and wait events.

blocks.content: Click a query row to drill into its details.
blocks.tooltip: The detail view shows explain plans, query samples, and wait event breakdowns for this query.

blocks.content:
You've explored the Queries Overview dashboard and learned how to identify slow queries and drill into their details.

From the query detail view, you can:
- View **explain plans** showing how MySQL executes the query
- Examine **query samples** with individual timing and parameters
- Analyze **wait events** revealing resource contention
- Review **table schemas** for missing indexes

---

### More to explore (optional)

- [Analyze explain plans](https://grafana.com/docs/grafana-cloud/monitor-applications/database-observability/investigate/analyze-explain-plans/)
- [Examine query samples](https://grafana.com/docs/grafana-cloud/monitor-applications/database-observability/investigate/examine-query-samples/)
- [Understand wait events](https://grafana.com/docs/grafana-cloud/monitor-applications/database-observability/investigate/understand-wait-events/)
- [Improve slow queries](https://grafana.com/docs/grafana-cloud/monitor-applications/database-observability/optimize/improve-slow-queries/)
